productDisplayName: Palm Tree Kids Boys Printed Blue Sweatshirts
description: Composition Dark blue hooded sweat-shirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, hood with drawstring, patch pocket on the waist with double sided openings, distressed look graphic on the front with applique work and ribbed hemline Fitting Regular   Wash care Machine wash in cold water Wash with like colours Wash/dry inside out Use mild detergents Do not tumble dry Use warm iron Do not iron on decor Remove all detatchable accessories Get your little one ready for nippy weather with this dark blue hooded sweatshirt from palm tree. The "Palm League" distressed lettering on the front will get him ready for all the action ahead. Team this with jeans and comfy footwear for a happy, casual outing with his pals, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on the skin and keeps him fresh and comfortable all day.
